name: pptx
tagline: Reads, edits, and creates .pptx decks (markitdown/pptxgenjs/LibreOffice) with design guidance and mandatory image-based QA.
verdict: Clean local-tooling skill: no secret access, no network egress, no shell-piped remote code, no hidden instructions. All commands are local file conversions using well-known packages (markitdown, pptxgenjs, LibreOffice, Poppler) from standard registries. The only real gap for an installer is that editing.md, pptxgenjs.md, and scripts/office/{unpack,soffice}.p

highlights.summary: Skill executes bundled scripts (scripts/office/unpack.py, scripts/office/soffice.py, scripts/thumbnail.py, lines 27/30/213) and links out to editing.md/pptxgenjs.md that were not fetched in this SKILL
No explicit 'do not use this skill for X' guidance is given anywhere in the file; scope is only defined positively.
